reviews.review_description: Someone called me the N-word and they said that my mom was dead and I couldn’t report him. Please fix it because I was upset. And I went to the menu and I can report him and he keeps saying that like My Dad wanted to go and get the milk and all this stuff.

I love the game, perfect nothing wrong. But one thing, when youre a newbie in the game, you only have a skin which gives out more of a male vibe. I wanted to suggest you guys, to encourage more female players to your game, create a female default skin so the player can choose between them. Because if the roles were reversed, I wouldnt want to play a female skin and I am a male. So newbies might uninstall the game because of it. I highly recommend to atleast give a look at my suggestion. Thank you.

The game was pretty good a long time ago, but now there are so many people that are toxic and are just cheating with no shame. Every match I go into I can’t even shoot anyone since they all dodge the bullet or team on me with tasers and tell each other if it’s a blank just to kill me. Try to dodge like everyone else? No, you have people making a boundary as big as their house to grab the gun and walk all the way into your face so you can’t dodge. Also, if you try to do that, there will be people who will straight up run in the walls and you can’t even see where they go, not like when you get stuck after going outside, they can run to the whole other side of the room outside the map. Mid game, horrible people.

The game mechanics itself are great but the use of exploits of leaving the table or going outside walls is terrible. It's completely okay for people to dodge things within their vicinity but to up and leave a table completely is crazy fo a game tats suppose to be about luck and chance. I've played quite a few matches and most complaints are because people use exploits that the devs don't seem to fix.

i was just taking a nice stroll in the lobby when all of the sudden i hear someone calling my name so i ask "whats up" and i hear this random dude that i dont even know say "your getting banned." So im obviously like "what why!?" And this guy doesn't even respond to me so i left confused because again,i didn't even know this guy so, now im here,waiting if i even getting banned.And if i do, im going to not take it lightly.

Some kid were bullying me and lied and said I said the N word and targeting me ( I accidentally deleted my long review so I had to make a short one) add reporting to matches if you see someone in a lobby named jax123 or something like that that was him (his review is a lie) still a good game thought if you want the video evidence I will show

it has nice mechanics and easy to learn controls personally i love the game. But the only problem is a bunch of

But this game is a 10 out of 10 and i would recommend it to many people! Best game ever!!!!

Besides that W game

1. So many new people are joining, and only asking how to play halfway through the matches. You should add a mandatory tutorial in the beginning when you first get the game that you can't skip. 

2. When you click on a player to see their rank and name, you should also be able to report them. There has been an unhealthy amount of cyberbullying and toxic people. 

3. The game is still awesome besides those things. Keep up the good work!

Kids saying racial slurs, being sexist, and cry babies all the time on this game, I can't get a single second of peace without a little 7 year old telling me he's gonna rape me and everyone at the table. Not to mention, people having bigger boundaries than prime Megan fox's butt so they easily dodge every little thing I do! This game genuinely might be more ragebait then playing brawhalla. Little side note for the developer, instead of working on expensive bundles that are not even worth it, for the love of god, try and make the "Devil's roulette" experience more enjoyable PLEASE.

reviews.review_title: It Works, But Now It Doesn't
reviews.review_description: I love this game. But for some reason, I tried loading it up today and it won't let me play. I just get the "Devil's Roulette" Black Screen for a few seconds and then the app suddenly closes on me. No idea why. I've tried everything but I'm just not getting in for some reason.

reviews.review_title: DEVS, PLZ READ IF U SEE THIS!!
reviews.review_description: Very fun game, the second I had my first round I WAS ADDICTED. Love the graphics, detail, but there is 1 problem about the targeting and teaming, the second I join a round 2 people that don't even know eachother start teaming for no reason, they heal each other, let the other person win, maybe add a reporting system or a anti teaming system? I almost quit the game due to targeting, teaming, and toxicity and little kids saying the n word for no reason, still a good game tho, I've also been false reported for teaming and bug abusing even tho I haven't broken any rule, like like today I dodged the bullet and someone said "BRO I'M REPORTING YOU FOR BUG ABUSE" like bro, then what is the energy drink for then?? There's also a bug where if someone leaves in their menu, the game breaks, can't grab the gun, can't grab ur items, (can grab ur trickets tho) u have to rejoin the game just to play again.

reviews.review_title: FIX THE GAME OR BOYCOTT IT!
reviews.review_description: This game has so much potential but it’s ruined by SO many people! Here is everything that’s wrong with this game: No report button which means if something bad is happening like someone swearing at you then you cannot report them for it. Going outside of the map, your supposed to be sitting down or standing but these people just walk around, jump and etc. It has gone to the point where they have started going through the floor and walls meaning it’s impossible to shoot them. Until you fix you’re game I will not play this no longer, to anybody reading this please leave the game if someone is doing this, it is not worth your time!

So this is a great idea, fun, enjoyable with the right adoptions.
But as per usual:
- Full of players who are obviously kids, with the usual lack of maturity that goes with it. ID verification is obviously massively failing here.
- Easy to hack/glitch, you can hide under tables, in walls with the right boundary setup so it’s impossible to be ‘killed’:
- Graphics are poorly designed, for such small sets and menus they could have done a better job on the graphics, it feels very PlayStation 1/2, we are in 2026 now and have the technology to make the graphics much better.
- No way to report toxic/disruptive players, Devil’s Roulette has no built in player reporting feature so the kids, and other players who cause mass disruption can go unpunished all day long. No vote to kick feature, you cannot leave the game mid round so you have to close the app and restart it. 

Will continue to play… cautiously. May uninstall, as this is horribly setup. Two stars for the idea

*update* 
Kids have made the game impossible to play, and as toxic as Fukushima, downgraded to one star, literally one star for the idea nothing else. 

- Game has lots of network connectivity issues, can’t leave games when they glitch out when a player leaves, multiple times I’ve tried to ‘shoot’ a player legitimately and the gun wouldn’t fire, so I lost points/the round
- Players (kids mostly) will ‘team up’ and use their turn to ‘shoot you’ because  you shot their mate, creating an unfair playing advantage.

Updated the review to one star, I’ve lost faith in the game and the developers. Will be uninstalling, don’t recommend the game to anyone, it just isn’t worth it.
For a Japanese company I am dumbfounded, I’d honestly expect a lot better from the Japanese, they usually have such quality and pride in their work, clearly not this game.

When I tell u this is the best game ever u gonna believe once u play this game I never ever had as much fun in any game but the is so fun. Is it actually so fun. There is no way there is any game better than this/the greatest game ever like I have played for like 1.5 years and it is still the best game that has been created just know I will be playing this every day because it is fun.

reviews.review_title: Good game, get over your toxicity issues
reviews.review_description:
It’s a good game, I don’t wanna sound like a bot but it’s not that bad. GRANTED, I keep voice chat off, but toxicity only goes so far with me anyway like I’m not affected by it. It’s hard to cheat, some people are better than others but all in all, if you turn off voice chat it’s a cool game. (If you play with friends I SUPPOSE you could turn voice chat on)

Best way to not be toxic is to either team on whoever’s being obviously toxic, or ignore all and use your dice to decide who to shoot.

Love the game and the idea, but its always the community that makes the game. Its full of little Timmy's that say slurs, cant go into a lobby without meeting one. Its very rare you come across people that are respectable and don't use cheap cheats. Not to mention the bugs and the inability to join most lobbies.

i really enjoyed this game because it is mostly just a game of luck buy i think not knowing what could happen next is exciting but the only downside is that you can lose your entire fortune if you gamble too much but i love the game anyways

The game is great, although people can be toxic i kinda just try to ignore them, i love the skins too they look great, but I do have one thing in mind, can you get banned for going up and down when your getting aimed at? I was just doing that in a game recently and someone said that he is going to report me to the discord for that, it doesn't really make sense, and adding on can I also get banned for getting up close to the person im aiming at? Anyways its great experience to play and I wish for great success for your guy's game!
